news.t: Fidelity® Expands ETF Suite With Launch of Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF
Best High-Yield Bond ETFs for Q2 2021

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced High Yield ETF (FDHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund using a quantitative screen to select high-yield bonds issued by US and foreign corporations. The fund seeks a high level of income, and may also seek capital appreciation. FDHY was launched on Jun 12, 2018 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Here's why investors are piling into junk bonds
data.text: CNBC's Dom Chu discusses why investors are piling into junk bonds with Michael Contopoulos of Richard Bernstein Advisors.

data.title: Fidelity® Expands ETF Suite With Launch of Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ETF--Fidelity Investments launches new active fixed income ETF, Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF.

data.title: Best High-Yield Bond ETFs for Q2 2021
data.text: The best high-yield bond ETFs for Q2 2021 are FALN, ANGL, and FDHY.
